languages.text: {n}Вокс-решетка Мастера Двигателей издает звонкую двоичную фразу, в которой звучит благодарность. Она вновь почтительно склоняет голову.{/n}
{n}The Drivesmaster's vox-grille emits a ringing binharic phrase that you interpret as thanks. She bows her head respectfully again.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вокс-решетка Мастера Двигателей издает звонкую двоичную фразу, в которой звучит благодарность. Она вновь почтительно склоняет голову.{/n}

{n}The Drivesmaster's vox-grille emits a ringing binharic phrase that you interpret as thanks. She bows her head respectfully again.{/n}

languages.text: {n}驱动大师的音阵格栅发出一串响亮的二进制语句，在你听来像是道谢。随后她再次恭敬地低下头。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drivesmaster's vox-grille emits a ringing binharic phrase that you interpret as thanks. She bows her head respectfully again.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}驱动大师的音阵格栅发出一串响亮的二进制语句，在你听来像是道谢。随后她再次恭敬地低下头。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La rejilla de voco de la maestra de motores emite una frase en binario que interpretas como las gracias. Respetuosamente, te hace otra reverencia.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drivesmaster's vox-grille emits a ringing binharic phrase that you interpret as thanks. She bows her head respectfully again.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La rejilla de voco de la maestra de motores emite una frase en binario que interpretas como las gracias. Respetuosamente, te hace otra reverencia.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le vox de la maîtresse des machines émet une suite binhaire retentissante que vous interprétez comme des remerciements. Elle incline à nouveau la tête avec respect.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drivesmaster's vox-grille emits a ringing binharic phrase that you interpret as thanks. She bows her head respectfully again.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le vox de la maîtresse des machines émet une suite binhaire retentissante que vous interprétez comme des remerciements. Elle incline à nouveau la tête avec respect.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Motor Üstadı'nın voks ızgarasından çınlayan bir ikilidil ifade yayılıyor. Teşekkür ettiğini varsayıyorsun. Başını tekrar saygıyla eğiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drivesmaster's vox-grille emits a ringing binharic phrase that you interpret as thanks. She bows her head respectfully again.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Aus dem Vox-Gitter der Triebwerksmeisterin ertönt ein binhärisches Klingeln, das du als Dank deutest. Sie neigt erneut respektvoll den Kopf.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drivesmaster's vox-grille emits a ringing binharic phrase that you interpret as thanks. She bows her head respectfully again.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ドライブマスターのボイスグリルの音は、感謝の意を表すように聞こえる。彼女は再び頭を下げる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drivesmaster's vox-grille emits a ringing binharic phrase that you interpret as thanks. She bows her head respectfully again.{/n}
